description: Opportunity scanner findings — continuously identified and prioritized improvements

entries.description: Add coverage tracking to metrics pipeline
entries.recommended_action: Add --cov flag to pytest in metrics collection step

entries.description: Mount SDK directory in docker-compose for direct development
entries.expected_impact: Eliminates need for docker cp when making SDK changes
entries.recommended_action: Cannot modify docker-compose.yml (protected path). Instead, add note to AGENTS.md about manual copy step.

entries.description: Agent model name format mismatch across subagent configs
entries.recommended_action: Update subagent .md files to use correct model name format

entries.description: Backend tests and SDK tests share the /app/tests/ directory causing path conflicts
entries.recommended_action: Move SDK tests to /app/sdk_tests/ or use separate test runner config
